text: Welcome aboard, helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. Check out #mod-guidelines to get started.
Welcome, guide_sam! You're in as an event helper. Head to #events to see what's coming up.
Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! You're all set as a member. Explore the channels and say hi in #introductions.
Welcome, mentor_lina! You've been approved as a mentor. Visit #mentorship to connect with mentees.
